summary: Validated the live auto-discover transcript-extraction wizard, including mode selection, cost confirmation gating, concurrency guard, per-transcript signal review, archetype review controls, and the current auto-discover apply failure.

assertions.reason: The extraction wizard presented clear Auto-discover and Guided mode choices before processing started.
The cost step displayed estimated tokens and estimated cost before extraction started.
Closing the wizard at the cost step left the pack idle; extraction did not start before explicit confirmation.
A second view of the same pack during extraction showed a disabled Extraction in progress button, blocking a duplicate run from the user surface.
Navigating away and back during extraction did not preserve the visible in-progress state.
Completed extraction displayed themes, attitudes, pain points, and decision patterns in the per-transcript review.
The auto-discover run produced 3 archetype cards from the attached transcripts.
Auto-discover results included the proposed-axes review section.
The proposed auto-discovered axes were not schema-valid before manual edits: feeSurpriseSensitivity, automationReliance, liveHelpPreference, needsChargeExplanationClarity, checkoutFrictionTolerance.
The first archetype supported inline edits and kept the edited name visible after closing the editor.
After deselecting every archetype, the selected count dropped to 0 and Apply to pack became disabled.
Selecting two archetypes enabled Merge selected and produced a combined archetype card.
Discarding an archetype required confirmation and removed it from the review list.

Applying the reviewed auto-discover results failed in the live UI because the reviewed archetype axis keys no longer matched the edited proposed axes, so no transcript-derived proto-persona was created.
Evidence-snippet traceability could not be exercised in auto-discover mode because applying transcript-derived personas failed before any transcript-derived persona card was created.
Re-run extraction could not be validated after auto-discover because the apply step failed before any successful reviewed result set could be preserved for replacement.
The auto-discover pipeline could not be completed because applying transcript-derived personas failed before the pack could be published with discovered axes.

frictions: Navigating away and back during extraction removed the visible in-progress state on the original tab.
Auto-discover suggested axis keys arrived in camelCase, and editing the shared-axis keys to snake_case caused apply validation to fail because archetype axis-value keys were not updated to match.
